prompt: A highly detailed {argument name="art style" default="traditional Chinese ink wash painting"} of an outdoor banquet. Across the top, an unrolled scroll displays Chinese calligraphy reading {argument name="scroll text" default="君不見，黃河之水天上來"}. Below, a landscape features a waterfall and red sun on the left, and a full moon over a water pavilion on the right. In the foreground, 10 figures gather around a stone table. The central bearded man in white robes is {argument name="central figure action" default="standing and raising a wine cup to the sky"}. He is surrounded by 8 seated scholars drinking and 1 servant boy carrying a wine jar. The table holds fruit and metal pitchers. Large ceramic wine jars sit on the ground. On the left, 3 goats rest among rocks. In the background right, 1 figure rides a horse near pine trees.
translatedPrompt: 一幅细节极其丰富的 {argument name="art style" default="中国传统水墨画"}，描绘了一场户外宴饮。画面上方，一幅展开的卷轴上书写着汉字书法 {argument name="scroll text" default="君不見，黃河之水天上來"}。下方山水景观中，左侧有瀑布与红日，右侧有水上亭台与满月。前景中，10 位人物围坐在石桌旁。中央那位身着白袍的蓄须男子正 {argument name="central figure action" default="站立并举杯向天"}。他周围有 8 位坐着的文人正在饮酒，还有 1 名侍童抱着酒坛。桌上摆放着水果和金属酒壶。地上放着大型陶瓷酒坛。左侧，3 只山羊在岩石间休憩。右侧背景中，1 位人物正骑马经过松树旁。

breakdown.creativeCore: 中国传统水墨宴饮图：生成一幅中国传统山水画，描绘文人雅士饮酒作乐的场景，上方配有书法卷轴。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: ink wash]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
